folio.label: 91r
folio.l: This worthy man , was lord of that village
This frere cam , as he were in a rage
Where as this lord , sat etyngö at his bord
Vnethe mygút the frere , speke a word
Til at the laste , he seide god ©ow se
This lord gan loke , and seide benedicite
What frere Ioún , what manä world is this
I se wel that sum thyngö , there is amys
ñe loken as the wode , were ful of theues
Sitte doun a noon , and telle me , what ©oure gref is
And it shal ben amended , if I may
I haue q¶ he had , a despyt to day
God ©elde it ©ow , a doun in ©oure village
That in this world , there nys so poere a page
That he nold han , abhominaciou~
Of that I haue resseyued , in the toun~
And ©et ne greuetú it me , half so sore
As that the olde charl , witú lokkes hore
Blasfemed hatú , oure holy couent eke
¢ Now Maister q¶ this lord , I ©ow byseke
No Maister Sire q¶ he , but Seruytour
Thougú I haue had , in scole that honour
God lyketú nat , that Raby men vs calle
Neither in market , ne in ©oure large halle
No fors q¶ he , but telle me al ©oure greef
Sire q¶ this frere , an odious meschef
This day be tid is , myn ordre and me
And so ¹consequens , in icú degree
Of holy chirche , god amende it sone
Sire q¶ the lord , ©e wot what is to done
Distempre ©ow nat , ©e be my confessour
ñe be the salt of the erthe , and the sauour
For goddes loue , ©oure pacience now holde
Telle me ©oure greef , and he a noon hi~ tolde
As ©e han herd byforn~ , ©e wot wel what
The lady of the hous , ay stille sat
Til she had herd , what the frere seide
Ey goddis moder q¶ she , blisseful mayde
Is there ougút elles , telle me feitúfully
Madame q¶ he , how thynketú ©ow ther by
How æ me thynketú q¶ she , so god me spede
I seye a cherl , hatú doon a Cherles dede
What shulde I sey , god late hi~ neuäe thee
His syke hede , is ful of vanytee
I holde hi~ , in a maner fransye
Madame q¶ he , by god I shal nat lye
